items.event_title: International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking
items.image_prompt: Emotional cinematic vertical 9:16 social media poster suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels and Facebook. A symbolic awareness scene with subtle glowing music notes and sound waves, showing a smartphone with visible bilingual text 'Choose Hope / Volíme naději' in Czech and English. The tone is hopeful and supportive, no fearmongering or graphic imagery, no official logos or real faces, modern warm atmosphere.
items.reels_text: Join us in spreading hope and support on International Day Against Drug Abuse. #Melody4U #ChooseHope #PersonalWish #ThoughtfulMoment #AwarenessDay

items.reels_text: Honoring the memory of victims of the communist regime with respect and dignity. #Melody4U #NeverForgotten #ThoughtfulMoment #RespectfulRemembrance #CzechMemorial
